title: Skyflipper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Skyflipper''' was a small transport craft that was produced by the [[Sandtek]] Corporation, based on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. It was designed to carry a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and one passenger across short distances.

[[Ric Olié/Legends|Ric Olié]] once flew a Skyflipper during his youth, and crashed with it. He was not discouraged by a near-fatal incident—which would be normal for most pilot novices—but instead built a new Skyflipper and continued his career. This accident contributed to other pilots nicknaming him "Reckless Ric."

{{Veh-stub}}
